title: Baleen Blades
summary: Gambell Students Have a Whale of a Time at KidWind Nationals Whaling is part of Gambell’s identity. A more recent addition to the community’s identity is the 300kW wind farm installed by Alaska Village Electric Cooperative (AVEC) in 2009. So, when students from the John Apangalook School started designing wind turbine blades for the Alaska Clean Energy Olympics competition, they took inspiration from wind and whale. Atop the Clean Energy Podium Two...
